entities.name: meeting-detect
entities.context: Command that scans Google Drive for new meeting transcripts and queues them for processing

entities.name: meeting-process
entities.context: Command that processes meeting transcripts after they are detected and queued

entities.name: Google Drive
entities.context: Cloud storage service used to store Fireflies transcripts folder

entities.name: Fireflies
entities.context: Meeting transcription service with transcripts stored in dedicated Drive folder

entities.name: N5
entities.context: V's personal workflow system with inbox folders for transcripts and meeting requests

entities.name: State Tracking via Filenames
entities.context: Pattern where Google Drive filenames serve as source of truth for processing state

entities.name: Idempotent Processing
entities.context: Design principle ensuring commands are safe to re-run without side effects

relationships.context: Scans Fireflies/Transcripts folder for unprocessed files
Processes transcripts from Fireflies folder ID 1JOoPs3WpsIbJWfU7jiD-s6kcQnvFg5VV
Downloads transcripts to N5/inbox/transcripts/ and creates requests in N5/inbox/meeting_requests/
Queues files for subsequent processing by meeting-process command
Uses [OBSOLETE-PREFIX] filename pattern to mark processed files
Filename-based tracking enables crash-safe idempotent re-runs
